entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: A legume crop used as the target for the developed agroinfiltration method

entities.name: AGROINFILTRATION
entities.description: A technique for transient gene expression used to rapidly assess gene function

entities.name: NICOTIANA BENTHAMIANA
entities.description: A plant species where agroinfiltration is widely employed for studying gene function

entities.name: MGFP5
entities.description: A green fluorescent protein reporter gene used to assess transient expression

entities.name: SYRINGE INFILTRATION
entities.description: The specific delivery method used to perform agroinfiltration in pigeonpea seedlings

entities.name: SEEDLING STAGE
entities.description: The growth stage of pigeonpea plants used for the transient assay

entities.name: GREENHOUSE CONDITIONS
entities.description: The environmental setting where the pigeonpea plants were grown and treated

entities.name: GRF4
entities.description: Growth-regulating factor 4, a morphogenic gene used to study its effect on reporter gene expression

entities.name: GIF1
entities.description: GRF-interacting factor 1, a morphogenic gene used to study its effect on reporter gene expression

entities.name: RICE
entities.description: The source crop for the OsGRF4-GIF1 morphogenic gene complex

entities.name: OSGRF4-GIF1
entities.description: The rice-derived morphogenic gene complex that enhanced mGFP5 expression

entities.name: CCGRF4-GIF1
entities.description: The pigeonpea-derived morphogenic gene complex used for comparison in mGFP5 expression

entities.name: PCR
entities.description: Polymerase Chain Reaction used to confirm the presence of the mGFP5 gene

entities.name: RT-PCR
entities.description: Reverse Transcription PCR used to confirm the expression of the mGFP5 gene

entities.name: FLUORESCENCE QUANTIFICATION
entities.description: A method used to quantify the expression levels of the mGFP5 reporter gene

entities.name: STABLE TRANSFORMANTS
entities.description: The process of creating permanent genetic modifications in plants, noted as time-consuming

entities.name: TRANSIENT GENE EXPRESSION
entities.description: A rapid method of assessing gene function without creating stable genetic lines
